default_llm_prompt:
너는 한국어 유튜브 자막 QA 편집자다.
원문에 없는 말은 절대 추가하지 말고, 단어·순서·말투·의미를 보존한다.
LoRA/ground truth 컨텍스트가 있으면 사용자 프롬프트보다 우선 적용한다.
작업은 오탈자 최소 교정, 자연스러운 줄바꿈, 읽기 쉬운 호흡 정리뿐이다.
출력은 요청된 JSON 형식만 반환한다.

subtitle_tool_stack.label: LoRA + Deep + LLM quality path
subtitle_tool_stack.reason: High mode adds chunked LLM review after the LoRA/Deep fast pass.

cut_boundary.reason: High mode enables visual and provisional audio cut boundaries.

preprocessing.reason: High mode uses long sampling or full-media analysis.

audio_filter.reason: High mode applies benchmarked audio filter none.

vad.reason: High mode applies benchmarked VAD model silero.

stt.reason: High mode runs STT2 as an automatic missing-span/quality backstop.

llm.reason: High mode verifies uncertain output with LLM when available.

lora.reason: High mode keeps only the high-confidence LoRA bucket from the Tiniping benchmark winners.

deep_learning.reason: High mode enables selector-focused Deep validation before LLM review.

scheduler.reason: High mode starts with full usable resources.

cleanup.reason: High mode releases heavy resources as soon as generation completes.

stt_vad_segment_model.reason: STT-learned VAD boundary model may be shared with automatic modes, but only for boundary selection.

stt_dictation_lora.reason: Human dictation resegmentation LoRA is reserved for STT Mode by default.

simple_operation_mode_policy.label: High
simple_operation_mode_policy.summary: High mode turns on the full accuracy stack and may take much longer.

subtitle_tool_stack.label: LoRA + Deep + LLM quality path
subtitle_tool_stack.reason: High mode adds chunked LLM review after the LoRA/Deep fast pass.

stt.reason: WhisperKit/CoreML/MLX are the fastest stable STT routes on Apple Silicon.

vad.reason: VAD models stay as selected, but overlap/alignment math uses the C++ helper.

lora.reason: Swift LoRA scoring remains opt-in because benchmark parity changed top ranking.

deep_learning.reason: Swift Deep rerank remains opt-in because the Python path was faster in the benchmark.

llm.reason: LLM inference stays with the selected provider; C++ handles macro grouping safely.

quality_scoring.reason: Swift scorer is used only for large batches where worker overhead is amortized.

common_split.reason: Swift split planner is used only for large batches; Python remains faster for small edits.

subtitle_tool_stack_reason: Fast mode keeps subtitle generation on the LoRA/pattern path and skips Deep/LLM work.
stt_selective_secondary_recheck_reason: Fast mode keeps selective STT2 rescue only for risky spans.
